scope: Cycle 9: Bug hunt C8 (encounter_card_overlay, screen_dither_layer) + CRT field hints feature

bugs_found.description: minigame.start() never called — was claimed fixed in C8 (BUG-022) but code was never pushed to GitHub. Only status JSONs were committed. Minigames created but _on_start() never fires, game_completed never emitted, overlay hangs indefinitely on await.
set_color_levels() always sets 'color_levels' param — was claimed fixed in C8 (BUG-023) but code was never pushed. PSX shader uses 'color_depth' not 'color_levels'.
bugs_found.fix: Route param name based on _render_mode: PSX->color_depth, CRT->color_levels

overall_assessment: Cycle 9: Critical discovery — C8 code changes were never committed (only status files were pushed). 2 bugs re-fixed and actually committed this time. Encounter card overlay enhanced with CRT palette + field hints. 25 total bugs fixed across 9 cycles.
